CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608 (B) AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAR-13-2018 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTER, HEATHER DENIECE AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-30-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-30-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-07-2016

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: There being no appearance nor an objection and notice having been given the Court ordered case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608 (b). Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2017 Continued To Mar-13-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set March 13, 2018 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)
